summary: Comprehensive backend testing of Nagarik notification job queue system. All 24 tests passed. Verified NotificationJob model, escalation scheduler enqueue, notification worker, exponential backoff, dead-letter state, and both schedulers starting on app startup.
critical_code_review_comments: The notification worker is correctly using FOR UPDATE SKIP LOCKED for concurrency safety
MAX_ATTEMPTS is set to 5, dead-letter state is triggered correctly after max retries
Both schedulers (escalation 60s, worker 15s) are registered and started on app startup
SSE broadcast remains inline in escalation_scheduler (as designed - not decoupled)
EMAIL_PROVIDER is 'ses' and SMS_PROVIDER is 'twilio' in .env - notifications will be sent via real providers
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up test notification_jobs during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Notification job queue decoupling is fully implemented and tested. The notification_jobs table exists and all CRUD operations work. Both escalation scheduler and notification worker are running. The notification_jobs table may be empty because existing incidents were escalated before the decoupling was implemented. New escalations will enqueue jobs to the notification_jobs table.
verified_features: NotificationJob SQLAlchemy model maps to notification_jobs table
Escalation scheduler enqueues jobs instead of sending directly
Notification worker polls pending jobs every 15 seconds
Both schedulers start on app startup
